no_tienes_cuenta: Don't have an account? Sign up
registro_exitoso: Registration completed. You can now login
reserva_registrada: We have registered your booking successfully.
enviado_confirmacion: A confirmation has been sent to
texto_rgpd: Your data will be automatically deleted 24 hours after the tutoring session. You can cancel the booking from the link included in the confirmation email.
no_profesores_registrados: No teachers registered in the system
comentarios_placeholder: Anything you want to tell the teacher?
acepto_privacidad: I have read and accept the
error_aceptar_privacidad: You must accept the privacy policy
error_seleccionar_fecha: Please select a date and time
cumple_rgpd: Complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
reservas_canceladas_no_visibles: Cancelled bookings are not shown in the calendar
no_reservas_activas: No active bookings for this day
responsable_texto: The data controller is the Public School, located at [school address], and contact email: privacy@colegio.edu.
finalidad_texto: Your personal data will be processed only for the following purposes:
finalidad_1: Manage tutoring bookings with school teachers.
finalidad_2: Send confirmations and reminders of booked tutoring sessions.
finalidad_3: Generate necessary documentation for the tutoring session (only during its validity).
base_legal_texto: The legal basis for processing your data is your explicit consent, expressed by accepting this privacy notice and completing the booking form.
datos_texto: We only process the data strictly necessary for the booking:
conservacion_texto: Your data will be kept only for the time necessary to manage the tutoring session. It will be automatically deleted from our systems 24 hours after the booked tutoring date.
destinatarios_texto: Your data will not be disclosed to third parties, except where required by law. Only the teacher you book with and the strictly necessary administrative staff will have access to it.
derechos_texto: You can exercise your rights to:
derecho_acceso_texto: Know what data we hold about you.
derecho_portabilidad_texto: Receive your data in a structured format.
derechos_ejercicio: To exercise these rights, you can contact us at privacy@colegio.edu or by writing to the educational center.
consentimiento_texto: By using our booking system, you explicitly consent to the processing of your personal data for the purposes described in this notice.
cancelar_confirmacion: Are you sure you want to cancel this tutoring session?
info_cancelacion: Once cancelled, you cannot recover this booking. If you need another date, you will have to make a new booking.
confirmar_cancelacion: Do you confirm that you want to cancel this tutoring session?
email_confirmacion_enviado: We have sent a confirmation email to
texto_rgpd_completo: Your data will be automatically deleted from our system 24 hours after the tutoring session. If you wish to cancel the booking, you can do so from the link included in the confirmation email.
descripcion_padre: Access to book tutoring sessions with teachers
descripcion_profesor: Access to manage your schedules and bookings
error_firebase: Error loading Firebase. Reload the page.
error_demasiados_intentos: Too many failed attempts. Try again later
error_credenciales_invalidas: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password
nombre_alumno_descripcion: Name of the child you are booking the tutoring for
placeholder_codigo: Enter the code provided by the school
info_curso: Write the class you are tutor of (e.g.: 1stA, 2ndB, 3rdC...)
email_confirmacion_info: We will send the confirmation to this address
y_consiento_datos: and I consent to the processing of my data for this booking
email_confirmacion_mensaje: Your tutoring session has been confirmed:
email_confirmacion_cancelar_info: If you need to cancel the tutoring session, you can do so through the following link:
email_gracias: Thank you for using our system.
email_automático: This is an automated message, please do not reply to this email.
email_cancelacion_mensaje: We regret to inform you that the following tutoring session has been CANCELLED:
email_cancelacion_nueva_info: If you wish to book a new tutoring session, you can do so through our system:
email_notificacion_profesor_mensaje: We inform you that the following tutoring session has been CANCELLED by the parent:
email_notificacion_profesor_info: This time slot is now available again for other bookings.
